AAPL.executive_summary: Demo research report: Apple remains a high-quality platform company; key research questions are hardware growth, services durability, AI device strategy, and valuation.

MSFT.executive_summary: Demo research report: Microsoft combines cloud scale, enterprise distribution, and AI optionality; capex intensity and regulatory scrutiny are key risks.

NVDA.executive_summary: Demo research report: Nvidia benefits from AI infrastructure demand; valuation, supply concentration, export restrictions, and customer capex cycles are the main watch items.

TSLA.executive_summary: Demo research report: Tesla’s research debate centers on EV demand, margins, autonomy optionality, energy storage, and execution risk.

AMD.executive_summary: Demo research report: AMD’s case depends on data-center CPU resilience, AI accelerator execution, and margin expansion.
